# Strategic Data Company of Ankara

Strategic Data Company of Ankara publishes institutional open-source threat indices and deterministic country reference surfaces.

Important pages:
- Home: https://sdcofa.github.io/
- Country Risk Almanac: https://sdcofa.github.io/almanac.html
- Data Access & MCP: https://sdcofa.github.io/mcp.html
- Weekly Letter: https://sdcofa.github.io/newsletter.html
- MCP catalog JSON: https://sdcofa.github.io/mcp-catalog.json
- Country data JSON: https://sdcofa.github.io/data/countries.json

Rules for agent use:
- Do not fabricate scores or analyst conclusions.
- Use published JSON and pages as authoritative static references.
- Treat future BNTI, WTI, and MENA score files as unavailable until published.

Contact: monarchcastleholdings@gmail.com
